summary: GH-97 spec is approved for a minimal post-check output contract. The spec keeps scope limited to a declarative package asset and offline validator consumption, and explicitly excludes post-check runners, runtime evidence, Core result envelopes, Harbor evidence schema, and cross-repo changes.
reviewed_validation_summary: Spec review consumed `.loom/specs/GH-97/spec.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-97/plan.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-97/implementation-contract.md`, and `.loom/specs/GH-97/task-carrier.md`; `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-97 --json` and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-97 --json` passed.
follow_ups: GH-98 must finalize failure mapping for Core/App category consumption.
GH-99 through GH-103 must cover local package resolution, package ref/lock, sample package closeout, Core fixture consumption, and deferred write guardrail.
